## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why the change belongs in Mentat.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant focused tests pass
- [ ] Full test suite passes, or skipped checks are explained
- [ ] CLI help, configuration examples, and docs match changed behavior
- [ ] No personal memories, databases, logs, or credentials are included

## Product Boundary

- [ ] The change supports selective capture, return, reflection, or connection
- [ ] It does not turn Mentat into a comprehensive activity logger by default
